# SCHMUCKS

> SCHMUCKS is a graphic t-shirt brand — "Fine Apparel for Idiots." Funny,
> mildly inappropriate designs printed to order on genuinely good heavyweight
> cotton. The aesthetic is 1960s New York deli meets internet meme brand. The
> joke is affectionate; the customer is in on it ("a proud community of idiots").

## What we sell
- Unisex graphic tees, $25 flat, sizes S–3XL, a few colorways each (cream, black, mustard).
- Matching sets: build-your-own — any two tees, with an automatic stacking discount.
- Expansion planned: hoodies and matching two-packs.

## What makes the product good
- ~180 gsm heavyweight ringspun cotton (heavier than typical fast-fashion tees).
- Ribbed crew collar, shoulder-to-shoulder taping, double-needle hems.
- Soft-hand prints that sink into the fabric rather than sitting on top.
- Printed to order in the USA: fresher prints, less waste, no dead stock.

## Commerce
- Stack & Save: buy 2 = 10% off, 3 = 20% off, 4+ = 30% off (mix & match, auto-applied at checkout).
- Free US shipping on orders over $100.
- 30-day returns on unworn shirts.

## Key pages
- Home: /
- Shop all tees: /tees and /collections/all
- Matching sets: /matching-sets
- Lookbook: /lookbook

- Care guide: /pages/care
- Journal (editorial): /journal
- FAQ: /pages/faq
- Contact: /pages/contact

## Honesty note
SCHMUCKS does not publish fabricated reviews, ratings, customer counts, or press
mentions. Trust is communicated through real guarantees, materials specs, and
return-policy clarity.
